entry_condition: Provider selected through v2.3 scorecard and no-go gates clear
exit_evidence: Signed sample SOW, fake-data rule, AGPL/source-code note, and approval matrix
payment_rule: No mobilisation release until fake-data and source-code clauses are accepted
no_go: Provider asks for real community records, hidden source ownership, or authority language

entry_condition: Contract lock complete and technical owner named
exit_evidence: Repository path, Decidim version, host plan, environment variables, backup plan, and first boot evidence
payment_rule: Release setup tranche only after repository and environment evidence are reviewed
no_go: Static mockup is presented as a Decidim sandbox or Decidim version is not named

entry_condition: Environment boots and fake seed package is approved
exit_evidence: Configured assembly, process, proposals, meetings, survey, budgets, accountability, and admin handover notes
payment_rule: Release configuration tranche only after screenshots exports and admin walkthrough are complete
no_go: Real member lists, voting eligibility, cultural material, or personal service cases are requested

entry_condition: Configured fake-data Decidim sandbox is ready for review
exit_evidence: Acceptance evidence, issue log, training record, backup/delete drill, support route, and handover pack
payment_rule: Hold final tranche until critical acceptance tests and admin handover are complete
no_go: Critical acceptance, safety, or admin access evidence is missing

exit_evidence: Go/hold/no-go decision memo with community authority, privacy, data sovereignty, hosting, and support conditions
payment_rule: No real-pilot spend or data entry until separate approvals exist
no_go: Sandbox outputs are used as real community authority or real records are imported without approvals
